_publications._publicationTitle: Dose-dependent effects of focal fractionated irradiation on secondary malignant neoplasms in Nf1 mutant mice.

_contextSnippet: the survival of unirradiated Nf1+/− mice was reduced compared to WT littermates (p=0.02, logrank test) with deaths occurring after one year of age
details: Survival was reduced compared to WT littermates (p=0.02, logrank test) with deaths occurring after one year of age
